_meta.source: FMP MCP connector (quote endpoint for VIX; premarket/news scan for flags)
_meta.note: Companion file for the dip/pop OHLCV feed (dip_pop_ohlcv.csv). Overwritten each run (not appended) — always reflects the latest snapshot, refreshed at premarket and market-close task runs. Flag values: Normal | Caution | Avoid. Avoid should gate a green technical verdict; Caution should annotate it. Derived from the daily macro calendar (CPI/PCE/jobs/FOMC/ISM), ticker-specific news, and the mandatory AI/semiconductor competitive-landscape query — see CLAUDE.md.
_meta.category_note: category = the primary driver behind the flag: macro-scheduled | sector-contagion | single-name | geopolitical | other. See dip_pop_flag_history.csv for the append-only burn-in log.
